scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:scenarios && npm run test:prompts && npm run test:python
scripts.dashboard:build: npm --prefix scripts/dashboard/web install && npm --prefix scripts/dashboard/web run build
scripts.test:frontend: npm --prefix scripts/dashboard/web install && npm --prefix scripts/dashboard/web test -- --run
scripts.test:ci: npm test && npm run test:dashboard && npm run test:frontend
